messages.content: 我需要翻译功能，我接下来输入的中文话请你给我翻译成英文
当然，我可以帮您进行翻译。请您输入需要翻译的中文内容。
过滤器的脉冲喷射清洁方式可使机器连续工作
The pulse jet cleaning method of the filter allows the machine to work continuously.
用户可根据需要设置脉冲频率
Users can set the pulse frequency according to their needs.
过滤材料为聚酯纤维，外覆聚四氟乙烯，可过滤 99.9% 的 0.3 微米粉尘。
The filter material is made of polyester fiber and coated with polytetrafluoroethylene. It can filter 99.9% of 0.3 micrometer dust particles.
安全防爆膜：可在发生事故时吸收爆炸波。
Safety explosion-proof film: It can absorb the explosion shockwave in the event of an accident.
防爆电机和电气控制箱：确保机器安全运行。
Explosion-proof motor and electrical control box: Ensure the safe operation of the machine.
模块化组合结构只需对原有设备和管道系统稍作改动，模块化除尘机组即可实现快速扩容，提高生产效率，扩大生产规模，降低扩容成本。

The modular combination structure only requires slight modifications to the existing equipment and piping system. The modular dust removal unit can be quickly expanded, thereby improving production efficiency, increasing production scale, and reducing expansion costs.
易于安装和弹出的下降插入式过滤器，可减少更换过滤器的时间。
The easy-to-install and pop-out drop-in filters can reduce the time required for filter replacement.
过滤器材料为聚酯，外覆聚四氟乙烯，可过滤99.9% 的粉尘（0.3 微米）。
The filter material is made of polyester and coated with polytetrafluoroethylene. It can filter 99.9% of dust particles (0.3 micrometers).
